reason: data_source='manually_curated' and needs_review=false, created post-2026-04-02, but description content is pure template ('a down-to-earth cafe celebrating healthy, delicious food', 'this independent venue', 'commitment to sustainable practices' — zero anchors). Treating as known-good would inflate reported FP rate when corpus-expanded detector correctly flags it. Surfaced during Part 4a stratified eyeball (sub_type=null bucket); see docs/table-data-quality-findings-2026-05-25.md 2026-05-28 update.
